name: TKB Critical Technologies 1 Warrant
summary: A TKB Critical Technologies 1 Warrant gives the holder the right to purchase a share of the company's Class A ordinary stock at a predetermined price, typically after the completion of a business combination. Warrants are often issued as part of a unit offering by special purpose acquisition companies (SPACs) to incentivize early investment. The exercise price, expiration date, and other terms are detailed in the warrant agreement.
